    Sign Up & Connect

    Connect Accounts

    Create your account and safely link your bank accounts, credit cards, and financial data. We use top-level encryption to ensure your privacy and security.

    02

    Set Goals

    Define Priorities

    Whether you’re saving, budgeting, or tackling debt, Bombon helps you set specific and achievable goals. We’ll break them down into manageable milestones to keep you motivated.

  • STEP

    03

    Track & Budget

    Income & Expenses

    Track your spending in real-time with automatic categorization. Set a personalized budget that helps you stay aligned with your goals and manage money more effectively.

    Achieve & Adjust

    Adjust Progress

    Receive helpful reminders and personalized suggestions to keep you focused on your goals. Adjust your budget and financial plans as your circumstances evolve, ensuring continuous progress.

Our mission is to help individuals and families take control of their financial lives by providing a comprehensive yet easy-to-use platform for budgeting, tracking expenses, saving, and achieving financial goals.

Easy Money

Management

With regular updates and new features based on user feedback, we ensure that the app evolves with your needs and keeps up with the latest in financial trends.

Bombon is a growing community trusted by users to manage their finances and achieve their goals. Continuously improving based on feedback, our intuitive app is loved by many for its ease of use.

Features

Top Security

Ensure the safety of your data with cutting-edge encryption and robust security protocols, giving you peace of mind.

Cloud Sync

Automatically sync your data across devices with cloud storage, ensuring your information is always up-to-date and accessible.

Fast Transactions

Complete transactions with speed and efficiency, reducing downtime and improving overall workflow.

Multi-Device Access

Access your account and data seamlessly from any device, ensuring you stay connected wherever you are.

Budget Insights

Gain a clear view of your financial situation with detailed insights into your budget, helping you make smarter decisions.

Customizable Dashboards

Tailor your dashboard to display the information most relevant to you, streamlining your workflow and boosting productivity.

Fast Speed

Experience rapid performance with minimal lag, making your tasks faster and more efficient without any delays.

Real-Time Alerts

Receive instant notifications about critical activities, updates, or changes, keeping you always informed and in control.

Advanced Analytics

Leverage powerful analytics tools to track performance, identify trends, and make data-driven decisions that optimize your strategy.

HELP CENTER

Your Guide to Quick Solutions

Explore our comprehensive Help Center for easy access to troubleshooting tips, FAQs, and step-by-step guides.

What is Bombon?

Bombon is a finance management application designed to help individuals and businesses track, manage, and optimize their finances. With features such as budgeting, expense tracking, bill reminders, investment monitoring, and more, it simplifies your financial management and helps you stay on top of your financial goals.

How do I create an account?

To create an account, simply download the app from the App Store or Google Play Store, then follow the sign-up prompts. You’ll need to provide an email address, create a password, and set up some basic information about your finances to get started.

Is my data safe?

Yes, your privacy and data security are our top priority. We use industry-standard encryption and security protocols to protect your financial data. We also comply with all applicable regulations to ensure your information is safe and secure.

How do I track my expenses?

You can manually enter expenses or have them automatically imported from your linked bank accounts. The app categorizes each expense (e.g., groceries, dining, transportation) to help you understand where your money is going. You can also set spending limits for each category.

How do I set up a budget?

To create a budget, go to the "Budget" section of the app, select the categories you want to track (e.g., food, entertainment, utilities), and set a spending limit for each category. The app will notify you when you're close to exceeding your budget for any category.

Can I set up bill reminders?

Yes! Bombon allows you to set reminders for upcoming bills and due dates. You'll receive notifications ahead of time so you never miss a payment. You can set reminders for credit cards, utilities, loans, subscriptions, and more.

To create an account, simply download the app from the App Store or Google Play Store, then follow the sign-up prompts. You’ll need to provide an email address, create a password, and set up some basic information about your finances to get started.

Is my data safe?

Yes, your privacy and data security are our top priority. We use industry-standard encryption and security protocols to protect your financial data. We also comply with all applicable regulations to ensure your information is safe and secure.

How do I track my expenses?

You can manually enter expenses or have them automatically imported from your linked bank accounts. The app categorizes each expense (e.g., groceries, dining, transportation) to help you understand where your money is going. You can also set spending limits for each category.

How do I set up a budget?

To create a budget, go to the "Budget" section of the app, select the categories you want to track (e.g., food, entertainment, utilities), and set a spending limit for each category. The app will notify you when you're close to exceeding your budget for any category.

Can I set up bill reminders?

Yes! Bombon allows you to set reminders for upcoming bills and due dates. You'll receive notifications ahead of time so you never miss a payment. You can set reminders for credit cards, utilities, loans, subscriptions, and more.

HELP CENTER

Your Guide to Quick Solutions

Explore our comprehensive Help Center for easy access to troubleshooting tips, FAQs, and step-by-step guides.

What is Bombon?

Bombon is a finance management application designed to help individuals and businesses track, manage, and optimize their finances. With features such as budgeting, expense tracking, bill reminders, investment monitoring, and more, it simplifies your financial management and helps you stay on top of your financial goals.

How do I create an account?

To create an account, simply download the app from the App Store or Google Play Store, then follow the sign-up prompts. You’ll need to provide an email address, create a password, and set up some basic information about your finances to get started.

Is my data safe?

Yes, your privacy and data security are our top priority. We use industry-standard encryption and security protocols to protect your financial data. We also comply with all applicable regulations to ensure your information is safe and secure.

How do I track my expenses?

You can manually enter expenses or have them automatically imported from your linked bank accounts. The app categorizes each expense (e.g., groceries, dining, transportation) to help you understand where your money is going. You can also set spending limits for each category.

How do I set up a budget?

To create a budget, go to the "Budget" section of the app, select the categories you want to track (e.g., food, entertainment, utilities), and set a spending limit for each category. The app will notify you when you're close to exceeding your budget for any category.

Can I set up bill reminders?

Yes! Bombon allows you to set reminders for upcoming bills and due dates. You'll receive notifications ahead of time so you never miss a payment. You can set reminders for credit cards, utilities, loans, subscriptions, and more.
